name: D&E, A Housing And Economic Empowerment Center, Inc.
description_short: Unable to verify current services—website currently inaccessible (403 Forbidden error). Historical records suggest non-profit housing and economic empowerment organization.
description_long: D&E, A Housing And Economic Empowerment Center, Inc. is listed as a non-profit organization focused on housing stability and economic empowerment. Based on the organization's name and non-profit classification, it appears designed to serve low-to-moderate income individuals and families seeking assistance with housing-related financial challenges and broader economic stability. The organization's website (depower.org) is currently returning a 403 Forbidden error, preventing verification of current service offerings, staff credentials, certifications, or operational status. Without accessible website content, specific service details cannot be confirmed, though the mission statement suggests focus on housing counseling and economic empowerment programs typical of community development organizations. The inaccessible website raises questions about current operational capacity and whether the organization maintains active consumer-facing services. Consumers considering this organization should attempt to contact them directly via phone or alternative channels to verify current operations, HUD approval status (if applicable), and available programs before relying on their services for credit counseling or housing assistance.
pros: Non-profit structure suggests mission-driven approach rather than profit-maximization
Name indicates focus on both housing stability and economic empowerment
Positioned in free-help category suggesting low-cost or no-cost services
cons: Website currently inaccessible (403 Forbidden)—cannot verify certifications, staff, or current services
No verifiable information about HUD approval or counselor certifications available
Unable to confirm operational status or active service delivery
best_for: Individuals seeking non-profit housing assistance (if currently operational)
Low-to-moderate income families needing free economic empowerment resources
diagnosis: D&E appears positioned as a non-profit housing and economic empowerment organization, but the inaccessible website prevents verification of current operations, credentials, or available services. Contact the organization directly before seeking assistance.
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
